name: Context Mode
description: FTS5-indexed knowledge base for large tool outputs

command.description: Command to spawn the context-mode MCP server

args.description: Arguments for the MCP server command

env.description: Additional env vars for the MCP server process

skipTools.description: MCP tool names to skip. In carapace, shell execution is routed through exec+rtk, so context-mode execute tools are disabled by default.

sandboxExec.description: Spawn context-mode inside the agent's sandbox container via docker exec instead of locally on the gateway

sandboxRegistryPath.description: Path to the sandbox container registry JSON (override for testing)
